suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document how manual verification should proceed when the required dev port 5180 is already occupied by a healthy app and `bun run dev` auto-increments to a disallowed fallback port.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `fix-persona-engine-scrutiny` handoff reports that browser verification initially launched a new Vite instance on 5182, which then had to be killed so the worker could reuse the already-healthy app on the mission-mandated port 5180.
